title: Creamy Chinese Semolina Chow Fun
description: A pungent and shaggy Chinese dish featuring semolina, this creamy chow fun is a show-off recipe that is dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the cooked rice noodles and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and coconut cream.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the noodle mixture and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Serve the creamy chow fun hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
